title: Another vpi_register_cb problem
body:
---


Author Name: **Rich Porter**
Original Redmine Issue: 587 from https://www.veripool.org
Original Date: 2012-12-06
Original Assignee: Rich Porter 

---

The fix for this issue

See http://www.veripool.org/issues/370-Verilator-vpi_register_cb-problem

Creates a new s_vpi_value object, but fails to take a copy of the 'format' register.

When a callback is triggered and vpi_get_value is executed by verilator to fill in the s_vpi_value record of the callback struct, it always treats the value as being vpiIntVal which causes a 
"Unsupported VPI function: " error on objects that cannot be represented as an integer.

The patched test case fails unless the verilated_vpi.h patch is applied.
